rows.label: tlk43310148_04_msg0001
rows.name:
Queen Lagert has grown
quite a bit gentler.

rows.label: tlk43310148_04_msg0002
rows.name:
I was pretty shocked that
she accepted that ceasefire
from the Superbians.

rows.label: tlk43310148_04_msg0003
rows.name:
Iira may have been up to no good, but
it was still the Superbians who dug up
that Judician Divine Beast weapon.

rows.label: tlk43310148_04_msg0004
rows.name:
It was their fault. Why are we
forgiving them like this?

rows.label: tlk43310148_04_msg0005
rows.name:
Maybe it's 'cos that Superbian
Blade saved the Queen.

rows.label: tlk43310148_04_msg0006
rows.name:
But I can't help wondering if
the Superbians didn't cook up
that little drama themselves...
